help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with us.

faqs.q: How do I create a merchant account?
faqs.a: Click on "Merchant access" at the bottom of the page, then click "Register your business". Fill in your business details and you can start publishing offers immediately.

faqs.q: How do I claim an offer as a consumer?
faqs.a: Browse offers on the home page or use the search. Click "Claim this offer" and show the QR code to the merchant in store to receive your discount.

faqs.q: How does the save feature work?
faqs.a: Create a free consumer account and click the save button on any offer or product. You can find all your saved items in your personal dashboard.

faqs.q: How do merchants validate a claimed offer?
faqs.a: Log in to your merchant dashboard and go to Scan & Validate. Scan the consumer QR code or enter the code manually to apply the discount.
Yes, Agora is completely free for both merchants and consumers.

faqs.q: How do I change the language?
faqs.a: Use the language selector in the top navigation bar. The entire platform supports English, French, Italian, Arabic, Turkish and Spanish.

faqs.q: I have a technical problem. What should I do?
faqs.a: Use the contact form below to describe your issue and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

help.contactSubtitle: A question or a bug to report? Write to us and we will respond quickly.
help.contactSent: ✓ Message sent! We will get back to you shortly.
help.contactError: An error occurred. Please try again.
